sentences.target: Ton ami a un bel appartement.

translations.fr: Ton ami a un bel appartement.
translations.en: Your friend has a beautiful apartment.
translations.es: Tu amigo tiene un apartamento precioso.
translations.de: Dein Freund hat eine schöne Wohnung.
translations.it: Il tuo amico ha un bell'appartamento.
translations.zh-Hans: 你朋友有一套很漂亮的公寓。
translations.yue: 你朋友有個好靚嘅單位。
translations.pt: Seu amigo tem um apartamento lindo.
translations.vi: Bạn của bạn có một căn hộ rất đẹp.
translations.nl: Je vriend heeft een prachtig appartement.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे दोस्त के पास एक खूबसूरत अपार्टमेंट है।
translations.el: Ο φίλος σου έχει ένα όμορφο διαμέρισμα.
translations.nb: Vennen din har en fin leilighet.
translations.sv: Din vän har en fin lägenhet.
translations.ro: Prietenul tău are un apartament frumos.
translations.da: Din ven har en flot lejlighed.
translations.ja: あなたの友だちは素敵なアパートに住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular, informal), masculine singular; used before vowel-initial noun here; modifies 'ami'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase possessed by 'Ton'.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; expresses possession.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'appartement'.
Adjective, masculine singular prenominal allomorph of 'beau' used before vowel/mute h; modifies 'appartement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the verb 'a' with modifier 'bel'.

sentences.target: C'est un bel endroit pour pique-niquer.

translations.fr: C'est un bel endroit pour pique-niquer.
translations.en: It's a lovely spot for a picnic.
translations.es: Es un lugar precioso para hacer un picnic.
translations.de: Das ist ein schöner Ort zum Picknicken.
translations.it: È un bel posto per fare un picnic.
translations.zh-Hans: 这是个野餐的绝佳地点。
translations.yue: 呢度係個好啱野餐嘅地方。
translations.pt: É um lugar ótimo para fazer um piquenique.
translations.vi: Đây là một địa điểm tuyệt vời để dã ngoại.
translations.nl: Het is een prachtige plek voor een picknick.
translations.hi: यह पिकनिक के लिए एक बहुत अच्छी जगह है।
translations.el: Είναι ένα υπέροχο μέρος για πικνίκ.
translations.nb: Dette er et flott sted for piknik.
translations.id: Ini tempat yang bagus untuk piknik.
translations.sv: Det är en härlig plats för picknick.
translations.ro: Este un loc minunat pentru un picnic.
translations.cs: Je to krásné místo na piknik.
translations.da: Det er et dejligt sted at holde picnic.
translations.ja: ピクニックにぴったりの素敵な場所です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative clitic pronoun elided before a vowel; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3sg; links subject 'C'' to predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'endroit'.
Adjective, masculine singular prenominal allomorph; modifies 'endroit'.
Common noun, masculine singular; predicate nominal after copula.
Preposition introducing a purpose/infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'pour' expressing purpose.

sentences.target: Votre fils devient un bel homme.

translations.fr: Votre fils devient un bel homme.
translations.en: Your son is becoming a handsome man.
translations.es: Tu hijo se está convirtiendo en un hombre guapo.
translations.de: Dein Sohn wird ein gutaussehender Mann.
translations.it: Tuo figlio sta diventando un bell'uomo.
translations.zh-Hans: 你儿子正在成长为一位英俊的男人。
translations.yue: 你個仔正變成一個靚仔嘅男人。
translations.pt: Seu filho está se tornando um homem bonito.
translations.vi: Con trai của bạn đang trở thành một người đàn ông điển trai.
translations.nl: Je zoon wordt een knappe man.
translations.hi: आपका बेटा एक सुंदर पुरुष बन रहा है।
translations.pl: Twój syn staje się przystojnym mężczyzną.
translations.el: Ο γιος σας γίνεται ένας όμορφος άντρας.
translations.nb: Sønnen din blir en kjekk mann.
translations.id: Anakmu sedang tumbuh menjadi pria tampan.
translations.sv: Din son håller på att bli en stilig man.
translations.ro: Fiul tău devine un bărbat arătos.
translations.cs: Váš syn se stává pohledným mužem.
translations.da: Din søn er ved at blive en flot mand.
translations.ja: あなたの息子さんはハンサムな男性になりつつあります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person plural/formal singular), invariable in gender; modifies 'fils'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; introduces a resulting state.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'homme'.
Adjective, masculine singular prenominal allomorph; modifies 'homme' (sense: handsome).
Common noun, masculine singular; predicate complement of 'devient'.

sentences.target: On a passé un bel été.

translations.fr: On a passé un bel été.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们度过了一个美好的夏天。
translations.yue: 我哋過咗一個好開心嘅夏天。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đã có một mùa hè tuyệt vời.
translations.nl: We hebben een geweldige zomer gehad.
translations.id: Kami melewati musim panas yang luar biasa.
translations.ja: すばらしい夏を過ごしました。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; often colloquial 'we'.
Auxiliary 'avoir', present indicative 3sg; forms passé composé with 'passé'.
Past participle of main verb; part of compound tense (passé composé).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'été'.
Adjective, masculine singular prenominal allomorph; modifies 'été'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'a passé'; homograph of past participle of 'être' but here a noun.
